'''shahowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabukalli|kabukalli]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-h-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabukalli|kabukalli]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shahowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæheweth|shæheweth]] || [[word:shæhewej|shæhewej]] || [[word:shæhewesh|shæhewesh]] || [[word:shæhewe|shæhewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shahohowoth|shahohowoth]] || [[word:shahohowoj|shahohowoj]] || [[word:shahohowosh|shahohowosh]] || [[word:shahohowo|shahohowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shahowoth|shahowoth]] || [[word:shahowoj|shahowoj]] || [[word:shahowosh|shahowosh]] || [[word:shahowo|shahowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shahofwoth|shahofwoth]] || [[word:shahofwoj|shahofwoj]] || [[word:shahofwosh|shahofwosh]] || [[word:shahofwof|shahofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shahowotho|shahowotho]] || [[word:shahowojo|shahowojo]] || [[word:shahowosho|shahowosho]] || [[word:shahowoko|shahowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shahowoth|shahowoth]] || [[word:shahowoj|shahowoj]] || [[word:shahowosh|shahowosh]] || [[word:shahowo|shahowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shahowothol|shahowothol]] || [[word:shahowojol|shahowojol]] || [[word:shahowoshol|shahowoshol]] || [[word:shahowokol|shahowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shahowothotho|shahowothotho]] || [[word:shahowojojo|shahowojojo]] || [[word:shahowoshosho|shahowoshosho]] || [[word:shahowoko|shahowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shahowothon|shahowothon]] || [[word:shahowojon|shahowojon]] || [[word:shahowoshon|shahowoshon]] || [[word:shahowokon|shahowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shahowothoro|shahowothoro]] || [[word:shahowojoro|shahowojoro]] || [[word:shahowoshoro|shahowoshoro]] || [[word:shahowokoro|shahowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
